---
title: "Publications"
description: >-
  Peer-reviewed publications, preprints and conference presentations by
  Natalia Gumińska, PhD.
pagetitle: "Publications"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
listing:
  # One listing per year, so each year gets its own heading and therefore its
  # own entry in the table of contents. All of them read the same
  # publications.yml and select on the `year` field, so adding a paper there is
  # still the only step. A new year needs a listing block and a matching
  # heading below.
  - id: papers-2026
    contents: publications.yml
    include:
      year: "2026"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    fields: [title, author, journal, description, categories]
    field-display-names:
      journal: "Published in"
    page-size: 25
  - id: papers-2025
    contents: publications.yml
    include:
      year: "2025"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    fields: [title, author, journal, description, categories]
    field-display-names:
      journal: "Published in"
    page-size: 25
  - id: papers-2024
    contents: publications.yml
    include:
      year: "2024"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    fields: [title, author, journal, description, categories]
    field-display-names:
      journal: "Published in"
    page-size: 25
  - id: papers-2022
    contents: publications.yml
    include:
      year: "2022"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    fields: [title, author, journal, description, categories]
    field-display-names:
      journal: "Published in"
    page-size: 25
  - id: papers-2021
    contents: publications.yml
    include:
      year: "2021"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    fields: [title, author, journal, description, categories]
    field-display-names:
      journal: "Published in"
    page-size: 25
  - id: papers-2018
    contents: publications.yml
    include:
      year: "2018"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    fields: [title, author, journal, description, categories]
    field-display-names:
      journal: "Published in"
    page-size: 25
  - id: papers-2016
    contents: publications.yml
    include:
      year: "2016"
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    categories: false
    fields: [title, author, journal, description, categories]
    field-display-names:
      journal: "Published in"
    page-size: 25
---

::: {.lead}
Peer-reviewed articles and preprints. The complete and canonical record is on
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4599-2897) and
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Xx8ApXAAAAAJ&hl=en).
:::

## Publications

### 2026

::: {#papers-2026}
:::

### 2025

::: {#papers-2025}
:::

### 2024

::: {#papers-2024}
:::

### 2022

::: {#papers-2022}
:::

### 2021

::: {#papers-2021}
:::

### 2018

::: {#papers-2018}
:::

### 2016

::: {#papers-2016}
:::

## Conference presentations

Selected talks and posters. Awarded presentations are marked.

::: {.timeline .reveal}
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2025 · Poznań</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Tracking poly(A) tail diversity with Ninetails: mixed tails from cells to mRNA therapies</div>
<div class="timeline-org">2nd Polish RNA Meeting</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2024 · Edinburgh</div>
<div class="timeline-title">The polyadenylation landscape after in vivo long-term potentiation in the rat brain <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">29th Annual Meeting of the RNA Society</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2023 · Warsaw</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Detection of non-adenosine residues within poly(A) tails using Oxford Nanopore direct RNA sequencing and deep learning <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">1st Polish RNA Meeting</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2023 · London</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Ninetails: a comprehensive tool for investigation of non-adenosine residues within poly(A) tails from direct RNA sequencing data</div>
<div class="timeline-org">London Calling (online)</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2022 · online</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Investigating the repertoire of nuclear-derived circular extrachromosomal DNAs in <em>Euglena gracilis</em> <span class="status-badge status-active">invited speaker</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">2nd Annual International Congress on Euglenoids</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2022 · Boulder</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Direct detection of non-adenosine nucleotides within poly(A) tails – a new tool for the analysis of post-transcriptional mRNA tailing <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">27th Annual Meeting of the RNA Society</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2019 · Rome</div>
<div class="timeline-title">Assessment of V2 18S rDNA as a DNA barcode for phototrophic euglenids <span class="status-badge status-signal">best poster</span></div>
<div class="timeline-org">8th European Congress of Protistology</div>
:::
::: {.timeline-item}
<div class="timeline-date">2017 · Prague</div>
<div class="timeline-title">The order of intron removal during splicing of α-tubulin (<em>tubA</em>) pre-mRNA in <em>Euglena gracilis</em></div>
<div class="timeline-org">15th International Congress of Protistology (Holz-Conner Travel Award)</div>
:::
:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-ghost" href="../about.qmd"><i class="bi bi-person"></i> About</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="../software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> Software</a>
:::
